\tzpentry{ID3582}{Concept Units Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3582 introduces Concept Units Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \Pi^{\mu\nu\rho} = \langle T^{\mu\nu}\rangle\, v^\rho\quad\text{(with contractions to produce scalar power output)}, \]
